title: heylel #1966
definition:
Lucifer = "light-bearer"

 1) shining one, morning star, Lucifer
    1a) of the king of Babylon and Satan (fig.)
 2) (TWOT) 'Helel' describing the king of Babylon
nasbUsage:

 1) shining one, morning star, Lucifer
    1a) of the king of Babylon and Satan (fig.)

    NASB:  a shining one
